text:
EXPLANATION: Extensive web search indicates this reference is a hallucination. While the citation appears in the reference lists of several recent AI-generated arXiv papers, no such paper exists in the Natural Product Reports database or any other academic publication record; the authors and title appear to have been fabricated and collectively cited by AI models.
